Bash(curl -s "https://book-club-slow-rising.vercel.app/api/books" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
books = data.get\('books', []\)
print\(f'Total: {len\(books\)}'\)
for b in books:
    if 'патри' in b.get\('name',''\).lower\(\) or 'Патри' in b.get\('name',''\):
        print\(f'FOUND: {b[\\"name\\"]} | coverUrl: {b.get\(\\"coverUrl\\"\)!r}'\)
# Show first 3 books to see structure
print\('\\\\nFirst 3 books:'\)
for b in books[:3]:
    print\(f'  {b[\\"name\\"]} | coverUrl: {b.get\(\\"coverUrl\\"\)!r}'\)
")

Bash(curl -s "https://book-club-slow-rising.vercel.app/api/books" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
books = data.get\('books', []\)
print\('Total:', len\(books\)\)
for b in books:
    name = b.get\('name',''\)
    cover = b.get\('coverUrl'\)
    if cover:
        print\('HAS COVER:', name, '|', cover\)
    if 'атри' in name:
        print\('PATRIOT:', name, '| cover:', cover\)
")
